### Before you hand in (exam checklist)
- [ ] My feature's tests live in `tests/exam/` and `uv run pytest tests/exam` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format .` are clean
- [ ] `uv run pyright` is clean
- [ ] The **Exam checks** workflow is green on this PR
- [ ] No merge conflicts with `main`
- [ ] Every group member can explain and defend this code
